name: Sun-Dried Tomato Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup loosely packed unsalted sun-dried tomatoes (not oil-packed)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the boiling water over sun-dried tomatoes in a small bowl.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes until completely soft.
3. Drain well, reserving liquid, and transfer rehydrated tomatoes to a food processor.
4. Add garlic, basil, capers, black olives, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Process until coarsely chopped, adding enough of the reserved soaking liquid to make a thick paste.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve immediately or chill.
Yields about 1 1/2 cups.
